# Rekt Markets

## Overview

Rekt Markets is a prediction market and token launchpad platform built on Base, the Ethereum Layer 2 network developed by Coinbase. The platform enables users to trade on real-world event outcomes, bet on sports, and launch tokens via bonding curve mechanics.

## Platform
- Platform: markets.rektpalace.com
- Company: Meta Bliss Group B.V.
- Parent Company: 36 Group AB
- Blockchain: Base
- Collateral: USDC

## Core Features
- Prediction markets for real-world events
- Sports markets and event trading
- Token launchpad with bonding curves
- On-chain settlement
- Wallet-based access

## Legal
- Terms of Use
- Privacy Policy
- Cookie Policy
- AML/KYC Policy
- DMCA Guidelines
- Trademark Guidelines
- Risk Disclosures
- Refund and Cancellation Policy

- Website: https://markets.rektpalace.com
